title: SmartStore Clear Airtight Dry Food Containers with Lids 0.35L Set of 10 - Plastic Storage Box with Lid, BPA Free, Dishwasher Safe - Stacking Kitchen Storage Containers - 12.5 x 9 x 5cm
features: AIRTIGHT FOOD STORAGE BOXES WITH LIDS - SmartStore dry food storage containers have easy-to-remove lids with stretchy rims that form an airtight seal, keeping dry ingredients fresh for longer. Includes 10 containers with lids (volume 0.35L, size L12.5 x D9 x H5cm).

MODULAR STACKABLE STORAGE BOXES - Make the most of your kitchen space with these modular and stackable food storage boxes that can fit inside drawers, cabinets, and pantries for effective and discreet organisation. Available in multiple sizes for fully customisable storage.

CRYSTAL CLEAR KITCHEN ORGANISER STORAGE - The ultra clear storage containers and lids make contents visible at a glance so you can quickly find what you need when baking and cooking. Mark boxes with an acrylic pen for even easier identification

FOOD SAFE & EASY CLEAN PLASTIC STORAGE CONTAINERS - For effortless cleaning, these BPA and phthalate free plastic food containers are dishwasher safe. All our food storage boxes go through strict product safety tests to ensure they are completely fit for food contact.
SUSTAINABLE FOOD CONTAINER - Food storage containers are a great way to reduce food wastage for sustainability. Made in Finland.
description: From the manufacturer Keeps food dry and fresh Airtight, stackable and modular containers Airtight The secure, airtight seal prevents leaks and spills, making these containers perfect for storing all types of food. See-through lid allows for easy identification of content in the kitchen drawer. Everyday Freshness SmartStore Vision containers keep your food fresh and secure, thanks to their airtight design. Perfect for carrying meals or snacks wherever your day takes you. Modular Stacking Organize your kitchen with ease. SmartStore Vision containers stack neatly, saving valuable space in your cupboards. You can even mark the contents with a pen for quick identification. Nordic Quality Proudly crafted in Finland, SmartStore Vision combines Nordic design with long-lasting durability. Safe for dishwasher and fridge.
